*6 issues* with activity in the last 24h  |  Critical: 0  |  Moderate: 3  |  Trivial: 1  |  Noise: 2
:warning: *Linear MCP unavailable — tickets not created. Manual triage needed.*

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-1J|MIT-MAP-1J: Fix brands list pagination offset out of range>*
PGRST103 — pagination on `GET /[locale]/brands` requests offset 96 but only 90 rows exist, crashing the page mid-paginate. Affects 8 users.
:bar_chart: 15 events  |  :bust_in_silhouette: 8 users  |  :arrows_counterclockwise: Recurring (first seen 2 days ago)  |  Last seen 15h ago
*Recommended action:* Guard pagination offset against total row count before issuing the PostgREST range query.

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-1B|MIT-MAP-1B: Missing table 'brand_slug_redirects' in schema cache>*
PGRST205 — `GET /[locale]/brands/[slug]` fails because `public.brand_slug_redirects` is not found in the Supabase schema cache. Hint suggests `brand_reports` table exists instead, pointing to a missing or renamed migration. Affects 2 users.
:bar_chart: 12 events  |  :bust_in_silhouette: 2 users  |  :arrows_counterclockwise: Recurring (first seen 3 days ago)  |  Last seen 21h ago
*Recommended action:* Run the missing migration to create `brand_slug_redirects`, or refresh the PostgREST schema cache via `NOTIFY pgrst, 'reload schema'`.

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-1C|MIT-MAP-1C: PostgREST error on brand detail page>*
Generic PostgREST/Supabase error on `/:locale/brands/:slug` — error details partially redacted in Sentry title but pattern matches DB-layer failures on the same route as MIT-MAP-1B. 1 user confirmed affected.
:bar_chart: 5 events  |  :bust_in_silhouette: 1 user  |  :arrows_counterclockwise: Recurring (first seen 3 days ago)  |  Last seen 21h ago
*Recommended action:* Open full Sentry event to retrieve exact error code; investigate alongside MIT-MAP-1B as likely related.

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-1V|MIT-MAP-1V: ReferenceError: AboutHero is not defined>*
`GET /[locale]/about` crashes with a ReferenceError — `AboutHero` component is referenced but not imported or exported in the About page module.
:bar_chart: 6 events  |  :bust_in_silhouette: 0 users  |  :new: New (first seen 1 day ago)  |  Last seen 1 day ago
*Recommended action:* Add the missing import for `AboutHero` in the `/[locale]/about` page file (likely a one-line fix).

• *<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-8|MIT-MAP-8: Error: aborted>* — `abortIncoming(node:_http_server)` | 25 events | :arrows_counterclockwise: Recurring (21 days) | 0 users | Standard Node.js client-disconnect aborts; expected infrastructure noise.
• *<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-21|MIT-MAP-21: NS_ERROR_FAILURE>* — `/:locale/brands/:slug` | 6 events | :new: New (22h ago) | 0 users | Firefox browser-level network error code; likely a bot or crawler hitting the already-broken brand detail route.
